name: roadmap
description: CourseNav rail — the compact secondary-sidebar syllabus nav (modules→lessons + per-lesson completion) shown beside the Kelas lesson sheet, derived client-side from the courses + progress slices. No new tables/convex, no routes.
notes: 0.3.0 (2026-07-10): REMOVED the Silabus⇄Roadmap toggle + the CourseRoadmap 'quest trail' view + RoadmapNode — they were a SECOND presentation of the same modules→lessons+completion data as the Silabus overview (DRY). The slice now exports only CourseNav, slimmed to a single flat nav rail (its density toggle dropped). Import path @/features/roadmap kept for stability; a future rename to a course-nav slice is the only remaining cosmetic debt. 0.2.0/0.1.0 (2026-07-08): ported the roadmap VISUAL from CareerPack skill-roadmap and rebuilt it as a quest trail + CourseNav rail on this app's courses/progress queries (now superseded). Reads the courses + progress BARRELS only (P1).
